button.name: Button
button.description: Primary trigger for a specific action or form submission. Use "Primary" for the main task, "Secondary" for alternative actions, and "Ghost/Tertiary" for low-priority tasks.

link.name: Link
link.description: A Link visually represents clickable text or elements that navigate users to other pages, sections, or resources.

sticky-footer.name: Sticky footer
sticky-footer.description: A persistent container at the bottom of the viewport used for high-priority global actions.

input-date.name: Input, date
input-date.description: Used for selecting a single date, a date range, or a specific point in time.

checkbox-with-label.name: Checkbox with label
checkbox-with-label.description: Used for binary choices (on/off) or when a user can select multiple options from a list of related items.

dropdown-select-default.name: Dropdown, Select, default
dropdown-select-default.description: Use when there are 5+ options or space is limited.

search-filters.name: Search filters
search-filters.description: A collection of inputs used to narrow down a dataset or search results.

radio-button-radio-button.name: Radio button
radio-button-radio-button.description: Used for mutually exclusive choices where the user must select exactly one option from a small list (2–5 items).

rich-text.name: Rich text
rich-text.description: A multi-line input field that allows for text formatting (bold, links, lists).

search.name: Search
search.description: A specialized text input designed to query a database or filter a page's content in real-time.

input.name: Input
input.description: Used for single-line alphanumeric data entry.

Description text#9633:17.default: A description helps users to define and understand the purpose of the input.

toggle.name: Toggle
toggle.description: Used for an immediate "on/off" state change.

breadcrumbs.name: Breadcrumbs
breadcrumbs.description: Use to show the user's current location within a hierarchical multi-level structure.

global-header.name: Global header
global-header.description: The persistent top-level container for branding, primary site-wide navigation, and user-specific actions.

side-nav.name: ✍️ Side nav
side-nav.description: Vertical navigation for primary application modules.

stepper.name: Stepper
stepper.description: Use to guide a user through a linear process with defined steps (e.g., Onboarding).

tab.name: .tab
tab.description: Secondary tabs label and icon building blocks

tabs.name: Tabs
tabs.description: Use to switch between related views within the same context without navigating to a new page.

avatar.name: Avatar
avatar.description: Visual representation of a user or entity.

tile-item.name: Tile, Item
tile-item.description: A flexible container for grouping related information.

collapse-accordion.name: ✍️ Collapse-accordion
collapse-accordion.description: Use to hide/show secondary information to reduce vertical clutter.

progress-bar-small.name: Progress bar small
progress-bar-small.description: Visualizes the completion percentage of a task.

digram-item-types.name: Digram, Item types
digram-item-types.description: Works like tags but contains only 2 letters (initials of category name)

page-header.name: Page header
page-header.description: The title area of a specific page.

scroll-bar.name: Scroll bar
scroll-bar.description: Custom UI for indicating and controlling scroll position within a specific container.

segmented-control.name: Segmented control
segmented-control.description: Use for mutually exclusive options that impact the immediate view.

search-result-card.name: Search result card
search-result-card.description: A specialized card variant optimized for scannability during a search.

tag-default.name: ✍️ Tag, Default
tag-default.description: Use for categorizing or labeling items.

tag-catalog-item-type.name: ✍️ Tag, Catalog item type
tag-catalog-item-type.description: Use for physical metamodel item types.

tag-updated.name: ✍️ Tag, Updated
tag-updated.description: Use for indicating something is recently updated.

table.name: ✍️ Table
table.description: Use for large datasets requiring comparison, sorting, and filtering.

alert-banner.name: ✍️ Alert-banner
alert-banner.description: Static, high-visibility message placed at the top of a page or section.

empty-state.name: Empty state
empty-state.description: A placeholder shown when a container has no content.

Body content#10964:28.default: Create policies to define how your platform operates.

error-state.name: Error state
error-state.description: A placeholder shown when a container has an error.

spinner.name: Spinner
spinner.description: Indicates a background process is active. Use Spinner for small, localized actions.

loader.name: Loader
loader.description: Indicates a background process is active. Use loader for large components.

loader-with-logo.name: Loader with logo
loader-with-logo.description: Indicates a background process is active. Use loader with logo in transition between apps.

loading-skeleton.name: Loading skeleton
loading-skeleton.description: Indicates a background process is active. Use Skeleton for page-level transitions.

maintenance-banner.name: Maintenance banner
maintenance-banner.description: A specialized Alert variant for scheduled downtime or degraded performance.

notification.name: Notification
notification.description: Small, temporary overlay that appears at the edge of the screen.

drawer-side-panel.name: Drawer, side panel
drawer-side-panel.description: A container that slides from right side of the screen.

modal.name: Modal
modal.description: A centered dialog that blocks the main content.

popover.name: ⛔️ Popover
popover.description: A non-modal floating container triggered by a click.

Body#7038:10.default: Body line text lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur

chat-content-thinking.name: .Chat content/Thinking
chat-content-thinking.description: Animated thinking indicator with 3 dots that pulse sequentially.
